/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/lexer/Lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/lexer/Token.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/lexer/TokenType.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/parser/Parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/parser/AST.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/semantic/SymbolTable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/semantic/SemanticAnalyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/semantic/TypeChecker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/analyzer/ConflictDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/analyzer/PrivilegeEscalation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/analyzer/RedundancyDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/codegen/AccessMatrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/codegen/MatrixGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/utils/Error.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/utils/JsonOutput.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compiler.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o compiler
